Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Deivis Ferreras vs. Saeid Ahmadi
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Deivis Ferreras vs. Saeid Ahmadi

Travis "Striker" Triskle vs. Randell Martell; Travis Heibert vs. Zachary Atkinson; David Dalrymple vs. Harold Brun; Devon Smith vs. Kevin Legasse [title fight].

Video.summary: Welterweight Wisniewski wants payback, after Jorge Masvidal used his training in underground, and barely legal fights, to whip Keith’s brother in a previous match. This fight features Masvidal’s freestyle technique and utter disregard for danger versus Wisniewski’s appetite for vengeance.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Episode 1
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Episode 1

Image.alt: Bodog Fight - Episode 1
Bodog Fight - Episode 1
Bodog Fight - Episode 1

Video.summary: Sam Franchi moved from Venezuela to Canada when he was 14 years old. His initial introduction to martial arts came first through Jiu Jitsu. He eventually made a complete transition to MMA. He is the Hard Knocks Flyweight Champion in the amateur division and hopes to keep a clean record while working his way professional division.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out Of The Cage - Sam Franchi
Video.title: Out Of The Cage - Sam Franchi

Image.alt: Out Of The Cage - Sam Franchi
Out Of The Cage - Sam Franchi
Out Of The Cage - Sam Franchi

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Mike Davis at HK49.

Video.summary: Tara LaRosa is a former student of all-world fighter Royce Gracie. She takes on perhaps the only woman who has a fighting chance to put the hurt on her…Amanda Buckner.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Episode 3
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Episode 3

Image.alt: Bodog Fight - Episode 3
Bodog Fight - Episode 3
Bodog Fight - Episode 3

Video.summary: Any world-class MMA fighter is fearless. Then there’s Nick Agallar who spent 16 months serving his country in Iraq. His opponent Debrah is lightning fast, dishes out lethal strikes and got a few grappling lessons from the Gracie clan along the way.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Episode 4
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Episode 4

Image.alt: Bodog Fight - Episode 4
Bodog Fight - Episode 4
Bodog Fight - Episode 4

Video.title: M1Challenge77_TutarauliVSLemos.mp4

Video.summary: Nate Oses learns from everyone he can, including some of the top fighters in MMA. He aspires not only to be a well-prepared fighter but to eventually move on to be a coach and mentor himself, helping to form great fighters in the future.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Nate Oses
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Nate Oses

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Nate Oses
Out of the Cage - Nate Oses
Out of the Cage - Nate Oses

Video.summary: Owen Carr has been involved in MMA for over 25 years, after being introduced to the sport at a very young age. He has learned persistence and has a strong belief in staying true to himself. He consistantly trains with 30 guys on the mat, and feels he is always well prepared. Today he shares some endurance tips that help him pace himself and stay focused in his matches.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Owen Carr
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Owen Carr

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Owen Carr
Out of the Cage - Owen Carr
Out of the Cage - Owen Carr

Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Jonas Correia v. Luis Diogo

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Jacob Smith at HK51

Video.summary: Chris Mattock is a black belt in Brazilian jiu-jitsu. He is now working on his stand up game in order to become a better all around MMA fighter.
